para_trans: Ambulance involved in a hospital accident
Administrative approval of the cost of repairs
Government Certificate No: Vahan-2026 / Q. No.96 / RUSA-1 (E. No.1578901)
Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital premises, Mantralaya, Mumbai.
1) Letter from Deputy Director, Health Services (Transport), Pune No. Asep / Room-118 III / Technical
Department / Vehicle Repair Expenditure Administrative Sanction / 5081-83/2026, Dy. 23.03.2026
2) Government Decision, Department of Public Health Vehicle - 2026 / Q.96 / RUSA-1, No.
Read here A. No. 2 as proposed under the proposal of A. No. 1.
In the decision of the government
1) "Medical Superintendent, Rural Hospital Umri, Dist. Nanded"
Instead, the following should be read in order.
